response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming in UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse language proficiency
Proven experience in open-source contributions and developer tooling
Demonstrated ability to work across hardware-software boundaries (e.g., DLang, embedded systems)
concerns: No C or embedded Linux kernel development experience as required
Zero evidence of networking security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.)
Japanese language proficiency is absent, despite being a mandatory requirement

key_factors.factor: Absence of Network Security Tech Exposure
